description: ACH payment of $5,000.00 posted to ledger on Jan 14 but appeared on Chase statement on Jan 15 due to 1-day processing delay.
resolution: Matched after applying 1-day timing offset per Chase bank rules.

description: Wire transfer of $12,345.67 on ledger matched to $12,345.68 on bank statement. Difference of $0.01 within tolerance.
resolution: Auto-approved: amount difference $0.01 within configured tolerance of $0.01.

description: Duplicate ACH debit of $2,500.00 appeared on ledger. Same reference number REF-9988 posted twice on Feb 1.
resolution: Flagged as duplicate. Second entry reversed after manual review confirmed processing error.

description: Payroll batch of $45,000.00 recorded on ledger Feb 10 but not on bank statement until Feb 13.
resolution: Transaction appeared on subsequent statement. Auto-resolved after 3-day waiting period.

description: Vendor payment of $8,750.00 cleared same day on BofA but ledger recorded posting date as T+1.
resolution: Matched using posting_date instead of transaction date. Same-day settlement confirmed.

description: International wire of $99,999.99 on ledger matched to $100,000.00 on bank. FX conversion rounding difference.
resolution: Difference of $0.01 within tolerance. Tagged as FX rounding for audit trail.

description: Two identical credits of $1,200.00 from same customer REF-4455. One was a legitimate second payment.
resolution: Manual review confirmed both payments are valid. Customer made two separate orders.

description: Check #5567 for $3,200.00 recorded on ledger Mar 10. Not found on any bank statement through Mar 15.
resolution: Escalated to reconciliation manager. Check was voided and reissued. Original stale-dated.

description: Original debit of $750.00 followed by credit memo of $750.00 on same day. NSF check returned.
resolution: Matched reversal to original. Net zero. Both entries cleared.

description: Unrecognized debit of $15,000.00 on Chase statement with reference MISC-ADJUST-042. No matching ledger entry.
resolution: Escalated for investigation. Found to be a bank fee adjustment applied incorrectly to the account.

description: Batch ACH credits totaling $22,500.00 posted to ledger Apr 5 afternoon, appeared on Chase statement Apr 6.
resolution: Standard 1-day Chase timing offset. Auto-matched after offset applied.

description: Invoice #INV-2024-100 for $10,000.00 on ledger. Bank shows payment of $7,500.00 from same customer.
resolution: Partial payment confirmed with customer. Remaining $2,500.00 expected next cycle. Partial match recorded.

description: Utility payment of $456.78 on ledger, $456.79 on bank statement. Penny difference from payment processor rounding.
resolution: Auto-resolved within $0.01 tolerance threshold.

description: Three identical charges of $999.99 from vendor CLOUD-SVC. Two are legitimate monthly charges for different accounts.
resolution: One confirmed as duplicate, reversed. Other two matched to separate GL accounts.

description: Wire transfer of $50,000.00 initiated May 10. Appeared on Chase May 12 after weekend processing.
resolution: Weekend delay. Auto-resolved within 2-day tolerance after bank confirmed processing.

description: Debit of $2,000.00 reversed same day as credit of $2,000.00. Customer chargeback on credit card payment.
resolution: Reversal matched to original transaction. Net zero applied. Chargeback documented.

description: Month-end batch of 50 transactions totaling $125,000.00. All posted to ledger May 31 but appeared on Chase Jun 1.
resolution: Standard month-end cutoff timing. All 50 transactions matched after 1-day offset.

description: Credit of $500.00 on BofA with description MISCELLANEOUS ADJUSTMENT. No corresponding ledger entry found.
resolution: Escalated. Investigation revealed it was a bank service fee credit that needed to be recorded as other income.

description: Recurring subscription of $29.99 on ledger matched to $30.00 on Chase. Vendor rounds to whole dollar on bank side.
resolution: Within $0.01 tolerance. Auto-approved with notation about vendor rounding practice.

description: Insurance premium of $18,000.00 debited from ledger Jun 20. Not on any BofA statement through Jun 25.
resolution: Escalated after 5-day wait. Found check was sent to wrong bank account. Manual correction required.
